title: Codex can track external events with respect to internal data
abstract:
Most analytics tools track your data, but completely ignore relevant external events like world news, platform shifts, pandemics, OpenAI announcements, etc. so you may be completely blind to the signals that impact growth most.

I built a tool that tracks our internal data with respect to external
abstract_zh: 别让世界大事蒙蔽了你的双眼！大多数数据分析工具只会盯着你自己的数据转，完全无视外界风云变幻——比如全球新闻、平台更新、疫情动态、OpenAI的新动向等等。我的新工具Codex来了，它能同时监控你内部的数据和外部的世界事件，让你在大好机会面前不再手忙脚乱，而是从容应对！
